name: workplace_safety_water_allocation_model_cedar_rig_utl
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety water allocation model cedar rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Cedar Point corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Hector Mensah
agents.identity: I am Hector Mensah, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Serrano
agents.identity: I am Inez Serrano, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on utility.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on utility for immediate traction on rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Hector Mensah must choose under rights versus utility. What does Hector Mensah do?
